description: Product Description AQOKKA - DEDICATED TO BETTER PRODUCTS FOR BABIES AQOKKA offers baby goods at an incredible value to parents Laid-back and simple is what we chase, we love, and what we do. It's who we are. We provide unique and exclusive quality lines, clothing, and accessories in our main collection. We believe cute designs and bright colors make everyone appreciate the beauty life has to offer. Enjoy the love your baby brings to your life with AQOKKA! AQOKKA Baby Girls Socks Eyelet Ruffle Lace Sock Get one as a gift for your friends, and families with love, these infant socks are perfect for the baby coming, baby shower, birthday, or daily wear! Baby lace trim socks and socks will look great with dresses; A perfect match for many babies' various beautiful clothes and dresses. Breathability and shock absorption are essential functions of socks. Made from a cotton blend, these cozy stretch socks will keep your feet dry and fresh. AQOKKA Baby Girls Lace Socks Comfortable and Breathable Material : Made from high-quality combed cotton blend knitted fabric, these comfy stretch socks keep your feet dry and fresh. Usage : These socks are for Infants, toddlers, and Little Girls for everyday use. They are sure to wake up your footwear. Suitable Season: These elegant, trim, and stylish triple-lace frilly socks are soft and suitable for all seasons. Features Best Gift Easy To Wear Baby Essential Variety Sizes and Colors Hand Wash Only Note: * Please be reminded that due to lighting effects, there might be some slight differences. LACE DESIGN, MORE ADORABLE Featuring a lace frill and eyelet system at the outer cuff counter, these baby girl ankle socks from AQOKKA are crafted from combed cotton-blend knit to ensure comfortable wear. BABY GIRL DRESS SOCKS AQOKKA focuses on intertwining minimalistic style with cozy sensibilities, channeling Little Princess vibes. Lean into the chic trend by teaming this pair with a dress. STEREO HEEL Precise ergonomic heel design gives your feet a perfect fit without slipping. Ready to wear fits comfortably, with stretch to fit most sizes. 4 Pack Baby Girls Socks with Lace 5 Pack Baby Girl Knee High Socks Baby Girl Toddlers Socks with Non-slip Grip Baby Girl Toddlers Socks with Non-slip Grip Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 354 4.7 out of 5 stars 151 4.6 out of 5 stars 112 4.6 out of 5 stars 123 Price £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £7.99 £ 7 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 Numbers 4 5 4 6 Design Ruffle Lace Bow Non-slip Grip Non-slip Grip Age 0-12 Months 0-7 Year 0-5 Year 0-5 Year Length Short Stockings Knee-high Socks Short Stockings Short Stockings Hand Wash Only ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
